scripts.build: pnpm --filter backend build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,magenta "pnpm run dev" "pnpm run dev:web"
scripts.test: pnpm --filter backend build && node --test _test_/*.test.mjs && pnpm --filter backend test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter backend lint && pnpm --filter web lint
